content.fact_text: Implemented Express router configuration for the User API, mapping endpoints to respective controllers and enforcing security middleware.

provenance_data.behaviour: Defines routing for user lifecycle, profile, and MFA operations. Integrates with Express, auth middleware, and controller logic. Ensures all routes are protected (except registration) and correlation-ids are propagated.
provenance_data.utility: Provides central API routing management, decoupling HTTP entry points from business logic controllers and ensuring standardized security enforcement via middleware.
